message: The other day, I was rushing out the door for a family outing when I noticed my youngest had left their favorite toy behind. In the hustle, I almost forgot to grab our go-bag, but then I remembered the little checklist I’d made. With a quick glance, I was able to grab the essentials—water, snacks, and even our important documents. It felt like a small win, but it really saved the day! We had a blast knowing we were prepared, no matter what came up. Have you ever had a little preparation help you out in a big way?
